commands.name: cite-doi
commands.title: Cite DOI
commands.description: Auto-detects a DOI from clipboard, adds it to the active citation list, and lets you copy citations

commands.name: cite-url
commands.title: Cite URL
commands.description: Auto-detects a URL from clipboard and resolves it to a citation via CrossRef, arXiv, PubMed, YouTube, or meta-tag scraping

preferences.name: focusBrowserOnMissingFields
preferences.title: Browser Focus
preferences.label: Focus article tab when fields are missing
preferences.description: When a URL can't be fully resolved, the gap-fill form opens and the browser tab for the article is activated (or a new tab opened) so you can copy fields across. Turn off if this disrupts your flow.

commands.name: cite-lists
commands.title: Citation Lists
commands.description: Manage citation lists — switch the active list, rename, duplicate, delete, and copy all citations from any list

commands.name: cite-dois
commands.title: Batch Cite DOIs
commands.description: Generate APA citations for multiple DOIs

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
